title: GenManHunt
description: ManHunt game plugin with more special functions
body:
ManHunt plugin with special functions.

## Teams

**RUNNER**: Get the goal, or kill all players in ELIMINATE goal

**HUNTER**: Get the goal or kill all players in RUNNER goal

**SPECTATOR**: Team for players with no respawn chance

## Game Goals

**Eliminate**: One of RUNNER or HUNTER team eliminated

**Diamond**: One of RUNNER or HUNTER player get diamond

**DRAGON**: RUNNER killed ender dragon

## Functions

**Includes standard ManHunt game features**

**Respawn**: Supports setting the number of chances for player respawn, can be infinite for HUNTERs

**RTP**: Replace the positions of all players during the specified period

**Explode**: Generated specified count of explosion in random player's position

## Localizations

The following languages are currently supported and can be configured in config.yml

- **en_US** / English (US)
- **zh_CN** / Simplified Chinese
